title: Lack of a feature to dynamically set Monday doc titles based on item names in templated document column
excerpt:

Currently, when a Monday doc column is configured, it’s possible to create a default template for the entire c…

posts.author: AMB (Alyssa Marie Basit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m not sure if this is an existing feature, but I’ve tried to explore and I don’t think it’s available yet.

Currently, when a Monday doc column is configured, it’s possible to create a default template for the entire column and set table fields as values. However, once the title is activated, there is no way to dynamically set the title, such as using the item name as the title instead of a fixed one.

While there is a workaround, such as adding a line, I believe allowing for a dynamic title would significantly enhance the title feature and provide more flexibility in customizing the experience.

posts.author: RobertParsons (Robert Parsons)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding my support for this feature. It would be helpful if we could set the title of a work doc dynamically, either by adding dynamic fields to the work doc name, or through creating an automation which pulls certain fields (e.g., item name) into the work doc’s title.
